stations.name: Closest stations are Fortitude Valley and Bowen Hills

ferry.note: Direct CityCat to the CBD and South Bank.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Teneriffe via Commercial Road and Vernon Terrace.

driving.motorway_access: Story Bridge for the inner-east. Inner City Bypass.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 8 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Walking access to James Street and Newstead Gasworks

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: The Teneriffe / Newstead Gasworks precinct is the suburb's main dining and retail area. James Street is within walking distance for additional dining.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage with Teneriffe heritage warehouse conversions defining the suburb's character.

pockets.name: Heritage warehouse pocket
pockets.character: Streets close to the converted warehouses. Premium pocket and the suburb's defining character.

pockets.name: James Street side
pockets.character: Streets close to James Street and the Valley.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving up to one of Brisbane's most established premium inner-CBD suburbs.
Apartment-led downsizing close to the river.
